[HOOK].text: Did you know Atlantis was REAL? | TEXT: SEEKING TRUTH
[HOOK].visual_prompt: Young woman searching ancient texts in a dimly lit library

[CURIOSITY].text: We can learn from its rise and fall. | TEXT: LESSONS FROM HISTORY
[CURIOSITY].visual_prompt: Cityscape with gleaming skyscrapers and then crumbling ruins

[EXPLANATION].text: Atlantis was a city of innovators. | TEXT: CREATIVITY KNOWS NO BOUNDS
[EXPLANATION].visual_prompt: Inventor tinkering with gears and machinery

[INSIGHT].text: Imagine what we could achieve if we harnessed its secrets. | TEXT: UNLOCKING SECRETS
[INSIGHT].visual_prompt: Scientist studying ancient artifacts with a microscope

[ENDING].text: So, what will you discover today?
